name: generate_workflow
description: Scan a project directory and generate WORKFLOW.html — a visual system workflow showing all components, their communication paths, concurrency model, and bottleneck analysis.

project_dir.description: Absolute path to the project root directory. Defaults to the current working directory.

output_file.description: Output file path for WORKFLOW.html. Defaults to <project_dir>/WORKFLOW.html.

open_browser.description: Open the file in the default browser after generation.
